arts.ttl: ‘Mind-blowing’ Chelsea set to DROP €500m worth of stars for Arsenal
arts.sum: In what was a remarkable show of squad depth from Chelsea, the likes of Joao Felix and Christopher Nkunku both played prominently against Noah, each scoring two goals, but may well be substitutes for the big Premier League match against rivals Arsenal. Otherwise, Maresca’s squad is likely to be given a complete overhaul to face an Arsenal team that has been stretched by injury of late and was forced to play a tough Champions League match against Inter Milan in midweek, going down 1-0 in Italy.

arts.ttl: 'Looking sharper': Peter Crouch claims Chelsea player is 'getting his confidence back' after Noah display

arts.ttl: Chelsea 8-0 FC Noah: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Felix, Nkunku star
arts.sum: Chelsea continue their demolition tour of Europe with a commanding 8-0 victory against FC Noah in the Conference League on Thursday night, maintaining their flawless start to the league phase.

arts.ttl: Merciless Chelsea set new record by crushing Armenian minnows Noah
arts.sum: Chelsea maintained their position at the top of the Conference League group table in scintillating fashion as they dismantled Armenian Premier League side Noah with an 8-0 win at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea sweep past Armenian minnows Noah with merciless eight-goal display
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca’s stand-ins raised the bar to blow the visiting team away.
